user_message: model a small friendly dragon with folded wings

spec.subject: a small friendly dragon with folded wings

lighting.key: warm 5600K soft box from camera-left, slightly elevated, broad diffuse wrap
lighting.fill: cool 7500K bounce from camera-right, one-third key intensity
lighting.rim: warm amber backlight from upper-rear separating wings and tail from background

palette.dominant: soft forest green scales with slight iridescence, #4A7C59-ish
palette.accent: warm amber-gold on belly plates and wing membrane highlights, #C8893A-ish

composition.foreground: slight ground shadow and two front feet visible at frame bottom
composition.midground: dragon body centered, sitting upright in relaxed pose with folded wings tucked against sides
composition.background: clean neutral gradient, minimal, keeping focus on character
composition.hero: the dragon's expressive wide eyes and friendly slightly open-mouthed smile

materials.type: semi-gloss organic reptile skin with subtle iridescent sheen
materials.notes: roughness ~0.45, fine scale displacement at 3-4mm real-world size, slight SSS for soft fleshy depth at scale edges
roughness ~0.6, no displacement, warm amber-gold tint, segmented plate pattern via texture

materials.type: thin translucent skin stretched over bone spines
materials.notes: SSS strong, roughness ~0.35, amber-green transmission tint, visible vein detail via normal map
roughness ~0.25, warm ivory to grey-brown gradient tip-to-base

materials.type: glossy reptile iris with vertical slit pupil
materials.notes: deep teal iris, high specular, slight cornea refraction, warm reflection catch-light

density.scattered: none — single character on clean surface
density.control: no scattering required; character is sole scene element

spec.scale_notes: Dragon sits approximately 0.5m tall at head tip in a relaxed seated pose; body length snout to tail base roughly 0.6m; folded wingspan tip-to-tip approximately 0.7m. Character reads as a small creature — roughly the size of a large house cat.
